title: Nature's Melody
description: Addon for Nature's Spirit that expands the default Nature's Spirit music in a suitable, vanilla-like fashion. Also works great together with Legacies and Legends' music.
body:
[![Join The Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/92912dea7a95ba9099104c1ea8ff1016955c06cf.webp)](https://discord.gg/TGbBb47Gr5) [![Support Me On Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nWCaRO9f/images/ac7d31b51b6a7194dbfc7a31d86a4b3806c1a1f0.png)](https://ko-fi.com/rebel459)

### Nature's Melody

Nature's Melody is a vanilla-style music expansion for Nature's Spirit's biomes, featuring new, additional tracks played in certain biomes alongside vanilla and default Nature's Spirit ones. Just download the mod, and enjoy the additional music brought to Nature's Spirit's other biomes!

If you want a similar soundtrack expansion treatment for all vanilla biomes and dimensions, check out Legacies and Legends/Music and Melody (linked below).

Required: [Nature's Spirit](https://modrinth.com/mod/natures-spirit)

Optional: [Legacies and Legends](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacies-and-legends) (mod) or [Music and Melody](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/music-and-melody) (resource pack)

### Music Credits

The music used belongs to the respective authors listed below.

C418 - https://c418.bandcamp.com (Flake)

BouncyTorch - https://bouncytorch.xyz (Albeit, Burning Konkrete, Cliff Hanger)

qwaston - https://www.youtube.com/@qwaston (814)

Talon Trueblood - https://www.youtube.com/@TalonTrueblood (Desert)

Oh Eight - https://www.youtube.com/@oheight (Sunrise on the Mesa 2)
